# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

FROM debian:bookworm-slim

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends ca-certificates curl gnupg dirmngr
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash -
RUN apt-get update
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends build-essential python3 make g++ git pkg-config
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash openssl procps net-tools iputils-ping unzip zip
RUN apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends tini
RUN rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

COPY package*.json ./
RUN npm install

COPY . .

EXPOSE 3000

ENTRYPOINT ["/usr/bin/tini", "--"]
CMD ["npm", "start"]
